data.rootCause: extractI18nKeys() only generates en values; generateFullPage() hardcoded empty objects
data.fix: Added buildPageI18n() that reads .i18n.json sidecar and inlines all translations
data.preventionRule: After page-gen, verify PAGE_I18N contains non-empty en/zh/th objects

data.description: Regenerating page overwrote sidecar .i18n.json with en-only data
data.rootCause: extractI18nKeys() only produces en; write step replaced full file
data.fix: Added merge logic to preserve existing zh/th translations in sidecar
data.preventionRule: Never overwrite .i18n.json — always merge with existing translations

data.description: Validation checked sidecar keys but not HTML PAGE_I18N inline content
data.rootCause: i18n-inject.cjs --check only reads .i18n.json, not the HTML script block
data.fix: Scorecard now also checks for PAGE_I18N registration in HTML
data.preventionRule: Validation must check both sidecar AND inline PAGE_I18N

data.description: REWATCH button (fixed, top-right, z-index 9990) overlapped sticky nav DLC tabs
data.rootCause: Both elements compete for top-right screen area; REWATCH z-index >> nav z-index
data.fix: Moved REWATCH to top-left below sticky nav (top: 50px, left: 12px, z-index: 99)
data.preventionRule: Fixed-position UI elements must not overlap sticky nav (top: 0) or FAB buttons (bottom-right)

data.description: Users mistook standalone DLC fragment page for the final product (only shows DLC content, no nav)
data.what: Fragment page lacks site navigation, header, other DLC sections
data.preventionRule: Fragment pages should include a banner linking to the full parent page

required_checks.description: AUTO-GATE: Block builds with i18n defects (seen 2 times)

page_gen_rules.description: Users mistook standalone DLC fragment page for the final product (only shows DLC content, no nav)
page_gen_rules.what: Fragment page lacks site navigation, header, other DLC sections

i18n_rules.rule: After page-gen, verify PAGE_I18N contains non-empty en/zh/th objects

defects.description: PAGE_I18N inline translations empty — language toggle had no effect
defects.rootCause: page-gen.cjs hardcoded empty objects instead of reading sidecar
defects.fix: Added buildPageI18n() function to read and inline sidecar translations
defects.preventionRule: After generation, grep PAGE_I18N in HTML and verify non-empty en/zh/th

defects.description: Sidecar lost zh/th translations on page regeneration
defects.rootCause: Write step replaced file with en-only data from extractI18nKeys()
defects.fix: Merge existing sidecar translations before writing
defects.preventionRule: Always read-then-merge sidecar files, never blindly overwrite

defects.description: REWATCH button blocks DLC navigation tabs on mobile
defects.rootCause: Fixed position top-right with z-index 9990 overlaps sticky nav
defects.fix: Repositioned to top-left below sticky nav, reduced z-index
defects.preventionRule: No fixed-position element should occupy top-right area (reserved for sticky nav tabs)

mutations.rule: AUTO-GATE: Block builds with i18n defects (seen 2 times)

mutations.description: Users mistook standalone DLC fragment page for the final product (only shows DLC content, no nav)

rules: Sidecar .i18n.json must preserve existing translations on regeneration
Validation must check HTML inline translations, not just sidecar file

mutations.rule: AUTO-GATE: Block builds with i18n defects (seen 2 times)
